name: Matcha Latte
description: Stone-ground ceremonial matcha whisked into silky cold milk. Pure, grassy, balanced.

name: Strawberry Matcha
description: Fresh strawberry compote layered beneath cold milk and ceremonial matcha. Bright, jammy, vivid.

name: Blueberry Matcha
description: Slow-cooked wild blueberries beneath cold milk and ceremonial matcha. Deep, juicy, floral.

name: Mango Matcha
description: Sun-ripened Alphonso mango beneath cold milk and ceremonial matcha. Lush, sweet, tropical.
